notes: Shared step library. Templates include these via {"$ref": "<slug>", ...overrides}. Overrides replace fields wholesale (e.g. supply depends_on when the including template needs ordering). Keeping telemetry/docs/i18n-extraction here means the quality bar cannot drift apart between templates.

telemetry.title: Error telemetry for {name}
telemetry.description: Capture every real error path of {name} in the project telemetry (SRS-equivalent) with area/severity/context breadcrumbs; no silent catches, no ignored promise failures.
acceptance_criteria: failure paths emit telemetry with area+severity
telemetry audit passes for the touched paths

docs.title: Document {name}
docs.description: Document {name}: purpose, contract/usage, states or flags, known limitations. Docs reflect current evidence, not intentions.

i18n-extract.title: Externalize and key all strings in {name}
i18n-extract.description: Move every user-facing string in {name} to the i18n layer with stable namespaced keys; ICU plurals where counts appear; verify +40% expansion tolerance.

unit-tests.title: Unit tests for {name}
unit-tests.description: Unit-test {name}: happy path, every typed error/edge state, boundary values; deterministic, no real network.

perf-budget.title: Performance budget check for {name}
perf-budget.description: Measure {name} against its 07-PERFORMANCE-PLAN.md budget on the reference low-tier profile; fix or split if over budget.
